positive: A bioluminescent cosmic forest scene, featuring stylized celestial flora (giant glowing mushrooms, starry ferns) intertwined with mythical, stylized forest creatures (e.g., a winged fox, a graceful owl). The composition must be highly detailed, centered, and suitable for a circular print layout. Use a deep indigo and violet color palette contrasted sharply against brilliant electric cyan and gold highlights. The style should be a fusion of intricate linework, neo-traditional tattoo art, and glowing bioluminescence, resembling a detailed woodblock print illustration. Focus on strong, clear silhouettes and high contrast against a galactic, starry background. Minimalist composition, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, watermark, signature, text, readable letters, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, noise, messy, messy composition, cartoon, grayscale, monochrome, realistic photography
